Heretic (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $27,716,205Details
International Box Office $30,378,637
Worldwide Box Office $58,094,842
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Two young missionaries are forced to prove their faith when they knock on the wrong door and are greeted by a diabolical Mr. Reed, becoming ensnared in his deadly game of cat-and-mouse.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,829,810 (39.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.56 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,221 opening theaters/3,230 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,309,092

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 8th, 2024 (Wide) by A24
International Releases: November 1st, 2024 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
November 8th, 2024 (Limited), released as Sapkın (Turkey)
November 14th, 2024 (Wide), released as Heretic (Еретик) (Russia (CIS))
November 21st, 2024 (Limited) (Brazil)
November 21st, 2024 (Limited), released as Hereje (Mexico)
Video Release: December 10th, 2024 by A24
MPA Rating: R for some bloody violence.
(Rating bulletin 2854 (cert #55086), 10/2/2024)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Filming location (city or town): Vancouver, BC, Canada
Filming location (country): Canada
Plot point: Missionary, Mormons, Religious
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: A24, Beck , Woods , Shiny Penny, Catchlight Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
